# BSD Resources Repository

A collection of resources for those interested in the Berkeley Software Distribution (BSD) family of operating systems.

## Table of Contents
- [Cloud Providers](#cloud-providers)
- [Sites](#sites)
- [Operating Systems](#operating-systems)
- [YouTube Channels](#youtube-channels)

## Cloud Providers

Several cloud providers offer BSD-based instances. Here are some examples:

| Provider | URL | Notes | Verified Date |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| AWS Lightsail | https://aws.amazon.com/lightsail | FreeBSD 15.0, 14.3, and 13.5 | March 31, 2026 |
| Hawk Host | https://www.hawkhost.com | FreeBSD 14 and 13 | March 31, 2026 |
| Server Space | https://serverspace.io | FreeBSD 14 | March 31, 2026 |
| Vultr | https://www.vultr.com | FreeBSD 15, 14, and 13, as well as OpenBSD 7.8 and 7.7 | March 31, 2026 |

Note: The verified date is the last known date of validation and may not reflect any changes made after that date.

## Sites

* vermaden - https://vermaden.wordpress.com

This site appears to be a personal blog focused on BSD-related topics.

## Operating Systems

Here are some popular BSD-based operating systems:

| Name | URL | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| DragonFly BSD | https://www.dragonflybsd.org | A user-friendly and feature-rich BSD variant. |
| FreeBSD | https://www.freebsd.org | Runs smoothly on VirtualBox and is beginner-friendly. |
| GhostBSD | https://www.ghostbsd.org | A user-friendly and stable BSD variant. |
| helloSystem | https://github.com/helloSystem/hello | An experimental BSD-based operating system. |
| MidnightBSD | https://www.midnightbsd.org | A BSD-based operating system with a focus on stability and security. |
| NetBSD | https://www.netbsd.org | Runs smoothly on VirtualBox and is beginner-friendly. |
| NomadBSD | https://nomadbsd.org | A portable and secure BSD variant for laptops and other mobile devices. |
| OpenBSD | https://www.openbsd.org | Tends to run slowly on VirtualBox; however, it remains beginner-friendly. |

Note: The notes provided are subjective and based on publicly available information.
